props.name: active
props.description: Toggle the active state for the component.

props.name: as
props.description: Component used for the root node. Either a string to use a HTML element or a component.

props.name: className
props.description: A string of all className you want applied to the base component.

props.name: href
props.description: The `href` attribute for the inner `<CLink>` component.
